text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take, which is also a great strategy if you are terrible at shooting. Not every opportunity deserves to be seized. Some doors are closed for good reason. Hesitation is underrated. Sleep on it. Think twice. The people who acted first and asked questions later gave us Enron and New Coke. Patience is not laziness. Sometimes the most productive thing you can do is absolutely nothing.
